name: semantic-design-system
description: Semantic design-token workflows for generating, deriving, validating, and applying design systems in web products.

interface.shortDescription: Semantic design-token workflows for web products.
interface.longDescription: Generate, derive, apply, and audit semantic design-token systems with local validation scripts, optional MCP tools, and design-system migration guidance.
defaultPrompt: Generate a semantic token system for this product.
Derive design tokens from this codebase.
Audit design tokens for accessibility and naming.
